articles.author: CBS/AFP
articles.title: New dinosaur weighing as much as 9 elephants identified by scientists - Yahoo
articles.description: The long-necked herbivore is the largest ever found in Southeast Asia, researchers said.
articles.content:
CBS News 24/7 Live
Scientists have identified a massive new dinosaur from remains discovered in Thailand, with the creature estimated to have weighed as much as nine adult elephants.
